Acme Corp Quarterly Earnings Report

October 15, 2023

Financial Highlights

Acme Corp reported strong quarterly earnings for Q3 2023, with revenue of $12.1 billion, up 15% year-over-year.

  • Net income: $2.3 billion
  • EPS: $4.52 (diluted)
  • Operating margin: 22.4%

Outlook

Management expects continued growth driven by international expansion and new product launches in the technology segment.
